title: Portfolio in eWM: Create Groups
excerpt:

posts.author: toby.lucich (Toby Lucich)
posts.cookedHtml:
Using the new project/portfolio functionality in enterprise Work Management, how do I create additional groups (or programs) to organize within a single portfolio view?

It shows that I have permissions to created/edit/change groups, but I’m missing the button at the bottom that would let me “Add New Group” to a board.

image1690×1085 94.9 KB

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Toby! Sorry for the delay here. I actually checked with our portfolio team and they clarified that while we don’t yet have the option to add groups, soon we will be releasing Group By in portfolios which will allow you to group by a specific value (like a status label, person, etc).

Hope this helps
